# P-G-004 — Typography anomaly on a critical field

> Incohérence typographique sur un champ critique

## Description (EN)

Different font or letter-spacing on a critical field (amount, supplier name, signing officer).

## Description (FR)

Police ou interlettrage différent sur un champ critique (montant, nom du fournisseur, signataire).

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Font anomaly — fonts in a document show inconsistent rasterisation patterns, indicating selective field replacement (the "edited line of a printed contract" attack).

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Direct forgery indicator at the rendering level. Default prior 0.25 + weight 0.7.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Mixed-source documents** legitimately combining content from multiple authors / tools.

## Production wiring

Requires the Python image-forensics worker to populate `event.payload.font_anomaly_score`.
